high_consensus.description: Admin mode change: specify transactional semantics for Redis write failure after audit intent (retry/backoff, rollback, idempotency key)
BufferedAuditChain restart: define resume algorithm (read last committed hash from DynamoDB), gap detection, crash simulation test
E2E compose CI: define suite/test timeouts, CI job sizing, parallelism, and merge gating policy

blockers.concern: Solo team + 30 tasks: single-point-of-failure, no buffer/de-scope matrix
Audit buffer hash-chain continuity under partial failures, gaps, reorderings
Admin JWT underspecified: replay protection, claim constraints, WAF/IP controls
Redis RuntimeConfig: multi-instance propagation consistency, no pub/sub or polling interval
SecretsLoader JWKS refresh: non-atomic swap, cross-instance stale key windows
